query:
SELECT u.username, f.created_at as friend_since
           FROM friendships f
           JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE
               WHEN f.user_id = $1 THEN f.friend_id
               ELSE f.user_id
           END
           WHERE f.status = 'accepted'
             AND (f.user_id = $1 OR f.friend_id = $1)
           ORDER BY u.username
